member.name: T:MongooseNet.ApplicationBuilderExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for ensuring MongoDB indexes at application startup.

member.name: M:MongooseNet.ApplicationBuilderExtensions.EnsureMongoIndexesAsync(System.IServiceProvider,System.Reflection.Assembly[])
member.summary: Ensures all indexes declared via are created in MongoDB. Call this once during application startup, after builder.Build().
member.param: Assemblies to scan. Defaults to the calling assembly when none are provided.

member.name: T:MongooseNet.BaseDocument
member.summary: Abstract base class for all MongooseNet documents. Provides , , and fields, plus a lifecycle hook that mirrors Mongoose's pre('save').

member.name: P:MongooseNet.BaseDocument.Id
member.summary: The document's unique identifier, stored as _id in MongoDB. Automatically assigned a new on construction.

member.name: P:MongooseNet.BaseDocument.CreatedAt
member.summary: UTC timestamp set once on first save. Never overwritten on subsequent saves.

member.name: P:MongooseNet.BaseDocument.UpdatedAt
member.summary: UTC timestamp refreshed on every save.

member.name: M:MongooseNet.BaseDocument.PreSave
member.summary: Lifecycle hook invoked by the repository before any write operation. Override to add custom logic (e.g. password hashing, field normalisation). Always call base.PreSave() to ensure timestamps are stamped correctly.

member.name: T:MongooseNet.CollectionNameAttribute
member.summary: Overrides the MongoDB collection name for a subclass. When omitted, MongooseNet defaults to the lowercase-pluralised class name (e.g. User → users), matching Mongoose.js behaviour.

member.name: M:MongooseNet.CollectionNameAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Overrides the MongoDB collection name for a subclass. When omitted, MongooseNet defaults to the lowercase-pluralised class name (e.g. User → users), matching Mongoose.js behaviour.

member.name: P:MongooseNet.CollectionNameAttribute.Name
member.summary: The MongoDB collection name to use.

member.name: T:MongooseNet.Exceptions.DocumentNotFoundException
member.summary: Thrown when a required document lookup returns no result.

member.name: M:MongooseNet.Exceptions.DocumentNotFoundException.#ctor(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Thrown when a required document lookup returns no result.

member.name: P:MongooseNet.Exceptions.DocumentNotFoundException.CollectionName
member.summary: The collection that was queried.

member.name: P:MongooseNet.Exceptions.DocumentNotFoundException.DocumentId
member.summary: The id that was looked up.

member.name: T:MongooseNet.Exceptions.MongooseNetException
member.summary: Base exception for all MongooseNet errors.

member.name: T:MongooseNet.IMongoRepository`1
member.summary: Contract for the MongooseNet generic repository. Program against this interface for easier testing and mocking.

member.name: M:MongooseNet.IMongoRepository`1.GetAllAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns all documents in the collection.

member.name: M:MongooseNet.IMongoRepository`1.GetByIdAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the document with the given , or null.

member.name: M:MongooseNet.IMongoRepository`1.GetByIdRequiredAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the document with the given . Throws when not found.

member.name: M:MongooseNet.IMongoRepository`1.FindAsync(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns all documents matching .

member.name: M:MongooseNet.IMongoRepository`1.FindOneAsync(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the first document matching , or null.

member.name: M:MongooseNet.IMongoRepository`1.CountAsync(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the number of documents matching (all if omitted).

member.name: M:MongooseNet.IMongoRepository`1.ExistsAsync(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns true if at least one document matches .

member.name: M:MongooseNet.IMongoRepository`1.InsertAsync(`0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Inserts a new document. Fires first.

member.name: M:MongooseNet.IMongoRepository`1.InsertManyAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Inserts multiple documents in a single batch. Fires on each.

member.name: M:MongooseNet.IMongoRepository`1.SaveAsync(`0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Replaces an existing document (upsert). Fires first.

member.name: M:MongooseNet.IMongoRepository`1.UpdateAsync(System.Guid,MongoDB.Driver.UpdateDefinition{`0},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Applies a MongoDB to the document with the given id.

member.name: M:MongooseNet.IMongoRepository`1.DeleteAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes the document with the given . Returns true if deleted.

member.name: M:MongooseNet.IMongoRepository`1.DeleteManyAsync(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes all documents matching . Returns the count deleted.

member.name: P:MongooseNet.IMongoRepository`1.Collection
member.summary: Direct access to the underlying for advanced scenarios.

member.name: T:MongooseNet.Indexes.MongoIndexAttribute
member.summary: Declares a MongoDB index on a property. Apply to properties of a subclass. Indexes are created automatically when is called.

member.name: P:MongooseNet.Indexes.MongoIndexAttribute.Unique
member.summary: Whether the index enforces uniqueness. Default: false.

member.name: P:MongooseNet.Indexes.MongoIndexAttribute.Sparse
member.summary: Whether the index is sparse (omits documents missing the field). Default: false.

member.name: P:MongooseNet.Indexes.MongoIndexAttribute.Name
member.summary: Optional custom name for the index.

member.name: P:MongooseNet.Indexes.MongoIndexAttribute.Order
member.summary: Sort order: 1 for ascending (default), -1 for descending.

member.name: T:MongooseNet.Indexes.MongooseIndexBuilder
member.summary: Scans subclasses for declarations and creates the corresponding MongoDB indexes. Call once at application startup.

member.name: M:MongooseNet.Indexes.MongooseIndexBuilder.#ctor(MongoDB.Driver.IMongoDatabase)
member.summary: Scans subclasses for declarations and creates the corresponding MongoDB indexes. Call once at application startup.

member.name: M:MongooseNet.Indexes.MongooseIndexBuilder.EnsureIndexesAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Reflection.Assembly},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates all indexes declared via across all subclasses found in . Safe to call on every startup — MongoDB is idempotent for existing indexes.

member.name: M:MongooseNet.Indexes.MongooseIndexBuilder.SafeGetTypes(System.Reflection.Assembly)
member.summary: Safely enumerates types from an assembly, skipping any that fail to load.

member.name: T:MongooseNet.MongooseOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for MongooseNet. Set properties inside the AddMongoose(opts => { ... }) delegate.

member.name: P:MongooseNet.MongooseOptions.ConnectionString
member.summary: The MongoDB connection string. Example: mongodb://localhost:27017 or a full Atlas SRV URI.

member.name: P:MongooseNet.MongooseOptions.DatabaseName
member.summary: The name of the MongoDB database to use.

member.name: P:MongooseNet.MongooseOptions.AutoRegisterModels
member.summary: When true, MongooseNet scans the provided assemblies for subclasses and registers their repositories automatically. Default: true.

member.name: T:MongooseNet.MongoRepository`1
member.summary: Mongoose-inspired generic repository for MongoDB. Wraps and provides CRUD, fluent LINQ queries, and automatic lifecycle hooks.

member.name: M:MongooseNet.MongoRepository`1.#ctor(MongoDB.Driver.IMongoCollection{`0})
member.summary: Initialises the repository with an existing . Prefer using for DI registration.

member.name: M:MongooseNet.MongoRepository`1.UpdateAsync(System.Guid,MongoDB.Driver.UpdateDefinition{`0},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.remarks: Automatically appends an updatedAt stamp to the provided update definition so partial updates keep the timestamp consistent.

member.name: M:MongooseNet.MongoRepository`1.Execute``1(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}})
member.summary: Wraps every MongoDB driver call to translate into , preventing driver internals from leaking through the public API surface.

member.name: T:MongooseNet.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering MongooseNet with the .NET DI container.

member.name: M:MongooseNet.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddMongoose(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{MongooseNet.MongooseOptions},System.Reflection.Assembly[])
member.summary: Registers MongooseNet with the DI container. Automatically discovers all subclasses in (defaults to the calling assembly) and registers a scoped and for each one.
member.param: Assemblies to scan for subclasses. When empty, the calling assembly is used.

member.name: M:MongooseNet.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddMongooseModel``1(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Manually registers a and for a specific model type. Useful when AutoRegisterModels is false.
